name: backend-role-injection
description: Inject backend-expert guidance into a read-only scout task for focused runtime review.

task.task: Using the injected backend review lens, inspect src/engine.ts, src/store.ts, and src/tmux.ts for reliability, concurrency, and artifact-consistency risks. Do not edit files.
task.outputContract: Return evidence-backed findings only. Include severity, file path, and concrete recommendation for each issue. If no issues are found, say so explicitly.
